nasb.text: And this commandment we have from Him, that the one who loves God should love his brother also.

esv.text: And this commandment we have from him: whoever loves God must also love his brother.

cnv.text: 愛　神的，也應當愛弟兄，這就是我們從　神領受的命令。

ccb.text: 爱上帝的人也应该爱弟兄姊妹，这是上帝给我们的命令。

csbs.text: 这是我们从基督所领受的命令：爱神的，也要爱自己的弟兄。
